title: rosa × engelmannii nothosubsp. engelmannii
intro: Rosa × engelmannii nothosubsp. engelmannii, also known as Engelmann's rose, is a hybrid rose species that is native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antibacterial compounds. The health benefits of Rosa × engelmannii nothosubsp. engelmannii include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat a range of health conditions.
